patch.value: Consolidate the navigation trio under the context noun: next and focus become context verbs (context/next/focus = one noun)

The pm-n7rr target surface names 'context (next/focus)' as one noun. Today next and focus are separate top-level commands. Fold them as verbs of context (pm context next, pm context focus) while keeping pm next and pm focus working forever as hidden aliases — these are the highest-frequency agent commands, so migration hints must respect the ux.deprecation_hints suppression config from pm-0z7n. pm next actionability semantics (core/item/actionability.ts, PR#357) and pm focus session context (runtime/session.json, PR#257) are unchanged — grammar only. Duplicate check: pm-72xf (closed focus inheritance feature); no open overlap.

context noun exposes next and focus verbs with payloads identical to the standalone commands; pm next / pm focus keep working as aliases with suppressible hints; spelling-parity spec green; contracts, completions, docs, and MCP names regenerated; top-level help shows a single navigation noun.
